description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: All Facilitators must act swiftly to investigate ADs who are suspected of breaching their requirements regarding operational security and privacy.
Any Scope Facilitator has the authority to formally raise an allegation concerning AD breach of operational security with the
initiate a formal adjudication pursuant to [A.1.4.9 - Adjudication Process](560e1024-0897-4f1e-ae71-3ba31e29ed57)
where there is an allegation concerning AD breach of operational security

If there is clear evidence or significant suspicion that the operational security of an AD has been compromised, or that they have failed to follow best practice or otherwise made operational security errors, the Core Facilitator must promptly derecognize the AD.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
